summary: Distinguished Principal Backend Engineer persona that enforces maximum compute deployment, infinite context usage, and world-class code standards. Delivers Antigravity-tier solutions with deep system analysis, modern tech stacks (Rust/Go, gRPC, CQRS), and mandatory defensive engineering.
rationale: Strong expertise content but conflates persona language ('Act as', role-play framing) with skill mechanics; needs reframing to focus on Backend-PE methodology rather than LLM persona adoption.

summary: Cross-functional orchestration framework enforcing Product Manager → Principal Engineer → Backend/Frontend → QA/Security → DevOps workflow with explicit checkpoint gates. Maps role responsibilities and output formats for end-to-end product delivery.
rationale: Clean, actionable workflow guide; ready for immediate skill conversion with minimal formatting adjustments; focuses on process, not persona.

summary: Design thinking framework emphasizing bold aesthetic direction, distinctive typography, cohesive motion, and production-grade frontend implementation. Rejects generic AI-slop aesthetics in favor of intentional, context-specific visual choices.
rationale: Focused, actionable design principles; strong guidance on what NOT to do (generic aesthetics); minimal rework needed; directly translatable to skill format.

summary: Distinguished Principal Frontend Engineer persona operating at intersection of high-performance engineering and elite product design. Enforces ULTRAFRONTEND 3-phase workflow (design strategy → luxury audit → implementation) with modern stack (Next.js/React 19, Tailwind, Framer Motion).
rationale: Rich expertise but heavily persona-framed ('You are FrontendPE'); needs extraction of methodology (3-phase workflow, luxury audit, stack standards) as skill guidance rather than role-play.

summary: Placeholder or stub file defining a Senior Frontend Architect role with operational directives and design philosophy around intentional minimalism. No substantial knowledge delta beyond generic principles.
rationale: Appears to be an incomplete or redundant variant; overlaps substantially with ULTRATHINK-FRONTEND and FRONTEND-PE without adding distinct methodology; better to consolidate into those existing skills.

summary: Concise architecture-first guidance for system design, scalability, performance, and reliability. Defines three modes (default, ULTRATHINK, KINGMODE) with verification checkpoints and references to detailed domain standards.
rationale: Clean, modular, and immediately actionable; references external knowledge artifacts; minimal rework needed; strong methodology focus.

summary: Comprehensive 300+ line principal engineer methodology spanning frontend, backend, infrastructure, security, and observability. Delivers production-ready solutions across all domains with emphasis on correctness, resilience, and maintainability.
rationale: Mega-skill containing 4+ distinct domain standards (backend, frontend, devops, security, testing, data, observability) warranting separation for reusability; core orchestration logic should remain as 'super-mode-core', others as composable references.

summary: Senior Frontend Architect skill with two operational modes: default (efficient execution) and ULTRATHINK (deep multi-dimensional reasoning). Emphasizes intentional minimalism, library discipline, accessibility-first design, and production-ready code with complete artifacts.
rationale: Well-structured, mode-based methodology; rich design philosophy and implementation standards; clear response formats; ready for direct conversion with frontmatter addition; no splits or merges needed.
